name: Chewey Chocolate & Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Beat the butter and sugars together in a large mixing bowl until well blended.
3. Add the eggs and vanilla, then beat until thoroughly combined.
4. Mix the flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt separately.
5. Gradually incorporate the dry ingredients into the wet mixture, beating until fully integrated.
6. Stir in the peanut butter chips.
7. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 9-11 minutes or until set.
9. Allow to cool slightly before transferring to a cooling rack.
